description: Engine-agnostic gateway metrics. Row 1-3: end-user SLOs. Row 4-5: developer internals (collapsed). Filter by model with $model variable.

panels.title: Time to First Token (TTFT) — bucket distribution (streaming only)
Time Per Output Token (TPOT) — bucket distribution
Total Request Time — end-to-end bucket distribution
Prefix Cache Routing — requires prefix-cache routing strategy
Prefix Cache Routing Latency (p50 / p90 / p99)
PD Disaggregation — requires P/D disaggregation enabled
PD Pod Selection Rate (Prefill vs Decode)
Engine HTTP Request Duration (p50 / p90 / p99)
Iteration Tokens per Step (p50 / p90 / p99)

title: AIBrix Gateway — Observability
